What to Do in Kailua: Hidden Gems and Must Sees

About Kailua Kailua is a beach town located on the Windward side of Oahu, about a 30 minute drive from Waikiki. A World Famous Beach Worth the Trip Lanikai Beach is known around the world for its powder-soft sand, crystal clear waters, and incredible coastal views. Kaneohe Sandbar Kayak Experience

Ahu’olaka, also known as the Kaneohe Sandbar, is a visually stunning, family-friendly destination on the island of Oahu. The sandbar is located on the east side of the island which is more commonly known as the Windward side.   The sandbar is extremely wide and large. It is about 1 mile (1.6 km) ...
